violations.description: Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling * were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. - Ceiling tiles in the back prep area are broken and crumbling or missing.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. - Mop not hung to drip and dry when not in use.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
